'''madunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ohaguro|ohaguro]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ohaguro|ohaguro]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| madunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mædinith|mædinith]] || [[word:mædinij|mædinij]] || [[word:mædinish|mædinish]] || [[word:mædini|mædini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:madudunuth|madudunuth]] || [[word:madudunuj|madudunuj]] || [[word:madudunush|madudunush]] || [[word:madudunu|madudunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:madunuth|madunuth]] || [[word:madunuj|madunuj]] || [[word:madunush|madunush]] || [[word:madunu|madunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:madufnuth|madufnuth]] || [[word:madufnuj|madufnuj]] || [[word:madufnush|madufnush]] || [[word:madufnuf|madufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:madunuthu|madunuthu]] || [[word:madunuju|madunuju]] || [[word:madunushu|madunushu]] || [[word:madunuku|madunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:madunuth|madunuth]] || [[word:madunuj|madunuj]] || [[word:madunush|madunush]] || [[word:madunu|madunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:madunuthul|madunuthul]] || [[word:madunujul|madunujul]] || [[word:madunushul|madunushul]] || [[word:madunukul|madunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:madunuthuthu|madunuthuthu]] || [[word:madunujuju|madunujuju]] || [[word:madunushushu|madunushushu]] || [[word:madunuku|madunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:madunuthun|madunuthun]] || [[word:madunujun|madunujun]] || [[word:madunushun|madunushun]] || [[word:madunukun|madunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:madunuthuoro|madunuthuoro]] || [[word:madunujuoro|madunujuoro]] || [[word:madunushuoro|madunushuoro]] || [[word:madunukuoro|madunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
